Memecoin launch tools for Solana teams

Launches need more than a CA. SlimeWire gives teams pages, scans, Telegram handoff, community cards, and trading context.

Open launch pageLaunch bot

Launch stack

Prelaunch links

Give people somewhere to land before the token goes live.

Telegram handoff

Groups should receive clean scan and action cards.

Token context

Charts, links, and visible risk notes keep the conversation grounded.

Raid flow

Make social pushes structured and visible.

Proof after launch

Keep receipts and public pages instead of losing history in chat.

Trader controls

Users need wallet, amount, slippage, and exit context nearby.

FAQ

What are memecoin launch tools?

They are workflows for launch visibility, Telegram alerts, token scans, charts, community actions, proof, and trader handoff.

Why should launch teams care about proof pages?

Proof pages and public links help a launch keep momentum after the first chat messages disappear.

Does SlimeWire replace launch strategy?

No. SlimeWire provides tools and visibility workflows, while launch teams still need community, liquidity, timing, and risk management.
